name: vercel
description: Reads deployments, projects, teams, and domains from the Vercel REST API, and writes projects, deployments, domains, and project environment variables.

risk.read: external Vercel API read of deployment, project, team, and domain data
risk.write: external mutation of Vercel projects, deployments, domains, and environment variables; approval required
risk.approval: read: none; write: required for every action
